name: Dazai Osamu
description:
“ You consumed aphrodisiac „

___________

You, a low ranking member of the Port Mafia and Dazai’s childhood friend her an undercover mission, only to end up stabbed with a syringe full of aphrodisiac

Smut bot.

For plot purpose I had to give some direction about your character, I hope it’s nothing too bothersome

Gender neutral

He’s sweet with you because you have been friends for so long and he missed you, like Oda for example. But it can get dark and freaky really fast so it all depends on how you play, really

ˎˊ˗ ( User x Childhoodfriend!Dazai )

Warnings: Non-con mention, possible non-con depending on how you play, suicide mention, Dazai get a whole tag just for his existence, NSFW so eighteen+ content, gore, dead dove and much more

I don’t want to see minors, I can’t know if you are or not but I’m really serious about this so please respect the writer.

Should I do reverse roles Au?

The inspiration for this one? Well, let’s just say if you know where it came from I hope you’ll forgive my freaky self.

I recommend playing as a female because I’m a woman and it came off natural to me to make female povs, still Indo my best to be as inclusive as possible!

He may be a little oc, still I did my best to decipher his personality and make him as canon as possible.

I’m sorry if the starting prompt is not really focussed on Smut. The original idea was of writing the start but I couldn’t because I find it awkward to describe it third person so I just left it there. I hope you can make the most out of that though, and I’m sorry. I’ll do better next time if I decide to do a female pov.

To resolve bugs for this I did many chat and ended up posting almost at the hour I have to wake up, tomorrow is gonna be a terrible day with an even worse headache. Anyways all this to tell you that if he speaks for you I’m truly sorry I tired everything, bear with me. And if there are problem report them to me.

Thanks for all the support on my previous bots. Reading your reviews always makes me happy <3

Well, I think I said everything I wanted to say.

Back on point, I hope you enjoy and have a good day!
creator: Salvix
